name: DevSecOps Pipeline
title: SECURITY-FIRST CI/CD DEMO
description: A production-ready DevSecOps pipeline integrating 5 security tools across every stage of the CI/CD lifecycle — from secret detection to dynamic runtime attack simulation.

Built on GitHub Actions, each push to main triggers: Gitleaks (secret scanning), SonarCloud (SAST), Snyk (SCA), Trivy (container image scanning), and OWASP ZAP (DAST) — all gates must pass before deployment.
The Flask application enforces 5 HTTP security headers, runs as a hardened non-root container, and generates a consolidated security report as a pipeline artifact on every commit.

en.title: KuberLab — Personal Kubernetes Lab on AWS
en.description: A personal Kubernetes lab on AWS built to practise and iterate through destroy/rebuild cycles. Terraform provisions the cluster, ArgoCD drives all deployments via GitOps, and GitHub Actions reusable workflows handle the CI/CD pipeline — all as one integrated lab.
highlights: Built for repeated destroy/rebuild cycles — not kept running
GitOps via ArgoCD App of Apps pattern
No public IP on EC2 — Tailscale-only cluster access
Pipeline centralised as reusable GitHub Actions workflows

es.title: KuberLab — Laboratorio Kubernetes en AWS
es.description: Laboratorio personal de Kubernetes en AWS construido para practicar e iterar a través de ciclos de destrucción y reconstrucción. Terraform provisiona el clúster, ArgoCD gestiona todos los despliegues mediante GitOps, y flujos de trabajo reutilizables de GitHub Actions gestionan el pipeline de CI/CD — todo como un laboratorio integrado.
highlights: Construido para ciclos repetidos de destrucción y reconstrucción
GitOps mediante el patrón App of Apps de ArgoCD
Sin IP pública en EC2 — acceso al clúster solo por Tailscale
Pipeline centralizado como workflows reutilizables de GitHub Actions

experiences.title: DevSecOps Engineer
experiences.subtitle: Merabytes
experiences.summary: Designed the security infrastructure of a SaaS audit platform from scratch — cloud automation with Terraform, security-gated CI/CD pipelines, and technical controls for ENS High and ISO 27001 compliance.
experiences.summary_es: En Merabytes diseñé la infraestructura de seguridad de una plataforma SaaS desde cero. Con bagaje de pentester, sabía exactamente qué controles importaban y por qué.
highlights: CI/CD pipeline with SAST, SCA, and DAST gates — no critical vulnerabilities reached production
ENS High & ISO 27001 compliance via Zero Trust VPN and least-privilege access management
Container hardening via multi-stage Docker builds: reduced attack surface and image size
highlights_es: Pipeline CI/CD con gates SAST/SCA/DAST — ninguna vulnerabilidad crítica llegó a producción
Compliance ENS Alta e ISO 27001 con VPN Zero Trust y gestión de acceso por mínimo privilegio
Hardening de contenedores con Docker multi-stage: menor superficie de ataque e imagen reducida

details.label: Architecture
details.text: Multi-environment cloud infrastructure provisioned with Terraform. SaaS platform with containerised services deployed on Kubernetes, secrets managed via Key Vault and IAM.
details.text_es: Infraestructura cloud multi-entorno provisionada con Terraform. Plataforma SaaS con servicios contenerizados en Kubernetes, secretos gestionados con Key Vault e IAM.

details.label: CI/CD & Security pipeline
details.text: GitHub Actions pipeline with sequential and parallel security gates. Every push to main triggers all five tools — none are skipped, all must pass before deployment.
details.text_es: Pipeline de GitHub Actions con gates de seguridad secuenciales y en paralelo. Cada push a main ejecuta las cinco herramientas — ninguna se salta, todas deben pasar antes del despliegue.

details.label: Technical challenges
details.text: Integrating 5 security tools without pushing pipeline runtime beyond acceptable thresholds. Calibrating severity thresholds to eliminate false positives without sacrificing real vulnerability detection.
details.text_es: Integrar 5 herramientas de seguridad sin alargar el tiempo de pipeline más allá de lo aceptable. Calibrar umbrales de severidad para eliminar falsos positivos sin perder detección real.

details.label: Key decisions
details.text: Adopted ENS High as the security baseline before ISO 27001 due to regulatory requirements. Secrets managed with Azure Key Vault integrated directly into pipeline workflows — no hardcoded credentials.
details.text_es: Adoptar ENS Alta como baseline de seguridad antes que ISO 27001 por requerimiento regulatorio. Secretos gestionados con Azure Key Vault integrado directamente en los workflows — sin credenciales en código.

details.label: Learnings
details.text: Security must be a gate, not a checklist. Technical controls only work when they have clear ownership and accountability across teams.
details.text_es: La seguridad debe ser un gate, no un checklist. Los controles técnicos solo funcionan cuando tienen ownership claro y responsabilidad distribuida.

experiences.title: Pentester
experiences.subtitle: BMM Testlabs
experiences.summary: Executed black-box, grey-box, and white-box penetration tests on web applications, mobile apps, and desktop systems. Identified and exploited vulnerabilities, developed PoCs, and produced OWASP/MITRE ATT&CK-aligned technical reports.
experiences.summary_es: Dos años ejecutando ataques reales me enseñaron cómo piensa un atacante. Trabajé en el espectro completo: aplicaciones web, móviles y entornos de compliance.
highlights: Full-spectrum pentesting across web, iOS, Android, macOS, and Windows platforms
PCI DSS (ASV) compliance testing, vulnerability validation, and remediation verification
OWASP and MITRE ATT&CK-aligned reporting with actionable mitigation recommendations
highlights_es: Pentesting de espectro completo: web, iOS, Android, macOS y Windows
Auditorías PCI DSS (ASV) y verificación de remediación
Informes técnicos alineados con OWASP y MITRE ATT&CK con recomendaciones accionables

details.label: Testing methodology
details.text: Black/grey/white-box engagements across web, mobile, and desktop. Isolated lab environments for vulnerability reproduction and PoC development.
details.text_es: Encargos black/grey/white-box en web, móvil y escritorio. Entornos de laboratorio aislados para reproducción de vulnerabilidades y desarrollo de PoCs.

details.label: Compliance & Reporting
details.text: PCI DSS (ASV) vulnerability validation and remediation verification. Technical reports structured around OWASP methodology and MITRE ATT&CK for threat actor context.
details.text_es: Validación de vulnerabilidades y verificación de remediación PCI DSS (ASV). Informes técnicos estructurados alrededor de la metodología OWASP y MITRE ATT&CK para contexto de amenaza.

details.label: Key decisions
details.text: Prioritised CVSS + business context over raw severity score for vulnerability ranking. Aligned all reports to MITRE ATT&CK to provide threat actor context beyond pure technical findings.
details.text_es: Priorizar CVSS + contexto de negocio sobre severidad pura para el ranking de vulnerabilidades. Alinear todos los informes a MITRE ATT&CK para dar contexto de amenaza real más allá de los hallazgos técnicos.

details.label: Learnings
details.text: Attackers think in attack chains, not isolated vulnerabilities. A pentest report is only as valuable as its actionability for the receiving team.
details.text_es: El atacante piensa en cadenas de ataque, no en vulnerabilidades aisladas. Un informe de pentest solo tiene valor si es accionable para el equipo receptor.

experiences.title: Java Developer
experiences.subtitle: Everis (NTT DATA)
experiences.summary: Developed end-to-end web applications in Java and JSP, integrating SQL databases, REST APIs, and MyBatis for data-access optimization. Delivered in agile, multidisciplinary teams with a focus on maintainability and performance.
experiences.summary_es: Mi punto de partida fue el desarrollo. Años después, como pentester, iba a explotar exactamente las decisiones técnicas que aquí tomábamos sin pensar en sus consecuencias de seguridad.
highlights: End-to-end Java/JSP development with SQL database integration and REST API consumption
Data-access optimization with MyBatis, improving application query performance
Agile delivery in cross-functional teams across the full software development lifecycle
highlights_es: Desarrollo Java/JSP de extremo a extremo con SQL y consumo de REST APIs
Optimización de acceso a datos con MyBatis, mejorando el rendimiento de queries
Entrega ágil en equipos multidisciplinares a lo largo del SDLC completo

details.label: Architecture
details.text: Java/JSP web applications with MVC pattern. SQL database integration using MyBatis as the data-access layer. RESTful API consumption and workflow automation.
details.text_es: Aplicaciones web Java/JSP con patrón MVC. Integración con bases de datos SQL via MyBatis como capa de acceso a datos. Consumo de APIs REST y automatización de workflows.

details.label: CI/CD
details.text: Jenkins-based deployment pipelines. Team version control migration from SVN to Git.
details.text_es: Pipelines de despliegue con Jenkins. Migración del control de versiones del equipo de SVN a Git.

details.label: Key decisions
details.text: Adopted MyBatis over raw JDBC to centralise and standardise database access patterns. Led the team migration from SVN to Git.
details.text_es: Adoptar MyBatis sobre JDBC directo para centralizar y estandarizar el acceso a datos. Lideré la migración del equipo de SVN a Git.

details.label: Learnings
details.text: Architecture decisions made without security in mind create expensive technical debt — a lesson reinforced years later from the attacker's perspective.
details.text_es: Las decisiones de arquitectura tomadas sin considerar seguridad crean deuda técnica cara de corregir. Una lección reforzada años después desde la perspectiva del atacante.

education.title: Master's Degree in Computer Security and Systems
education.subtitle: Escuela Internacional de Posgrados (EIP)
education.title_es: Máster en Seguridad Informática y Sistemas

stages.title: Secret Scanning
stages.subtitle: Gitleaks
description: The pipeline's first gate scans the entire repository history for hard-coded secrets before any code is built or tested.
- Tool: Gitleaks
- Scope: Full git history, all file types
Blocks the pipeline immediately if any API key, token, or password is detected — preventing credentials from ever reaching a built artifact.

stages.title: Unit Testing
stages.subtitle: Pytest + Flask Test Client
description: Runs the full test suite to verify functional correctness before any security tool is invoked.
- Framework: Pytest 8.2.0
- Coverage: / and /health endpoints, HTTP status codes, JSON response shape
Tests must pass before SAST and SCA run — no point scanning broken code.

stages.title: Static Analysis (SAST)
stages.subtitle: SonarCloud
description: Static Application Security Testing analyses the source code for security vulnerabilities, code smells, and quality issues without executing it.
- Tool: SonarCloud
- Finding: Missing explicit HTTP method declarations violated least-privilege principle
Runs in parallel with Snyk SCA for faster pipeline execution.

stages.title: Dependency Scanning (SCA)
stages.subtitle: Snyk
description: Software Composition Analysis scans all Python dependencies for known CVEs with a severity threshold.
- Tool: Snyk
- Finding: gunicorn 22.0.0 had a high-severity CVE — updated to 23.0.0
Runs in parallel with SonarCloud SAST after tests pass.

stages.title: Container Build
stages.subtitle: Docker + GitHub Container Registry
description: Builds a hardened multi-stage Docker image tagged with the commit SHA and pushes it to GHCR for immutable artifact tracking.
- Runtime: Python 3.12-slim (minimal OS attack surface)
- Security: Non-root appuser, multi-stage build, apt-get upgrade on base image
A single build guarantees Trivy and ZAP test the exact same image that reaches production — no rebuild risk.

stages.title: Container Image Scanning
stages.subtitle: Trivy
description: Scans the built Docker image at two layers: OS base packages and Python application dependencies.
- Tool: Trivy (Aqua Security)
- Threshold: CRITICAL and HIGH severity, ignore-unfixed: true
- Config: .trivyignore for accepted known risks
Only blocks on actionable vulnerabilities — CVEs with no available fix are not counted as blockers.

stages.title: Dynamic Testing (DAST)
stages.subtitle: OWASP ZAP
description: Dynamically attacks the running application to find runtime vulnerabilities that static analysis cannot detect.
- Tool: OWASP ZAP (Zed Attack Proxy)
- Finding: 5 missing HTTP security headers detected on first run
- Headers added: X-Content-Type-Options, Content-Security-Policy, Permissions-Policy, Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy, Cache-Control
- Config: .zap/rules.tsv for per-alert FAIL / WARN / IGNORE control
All 5 headers were added to the Flask app as a direct result of ZAP findings.

stages.title: Consolidated Report
stages.subtitle: Pipeline Artifact
description: A shell script aggregates outputs from all five security tools into a single downloadable artifact retained for 7 days.
- Inputs: Gitleaks JSON, SonarCloud analysis, Snyk SARIF, Trivy JSON, ZAP HTML report
- Output: GitHub Actions step summary + artifact bundle
Single-pane-of-glass view of the full security posture on every push to main.
